mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL indicates accelerating inflation expectations, prompting market participants to price in tighter monetary policy, which increases discount rates and reduces present value of future equity cash flows, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show positive correlation with CPIAUCSL momentum.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 4.0%, labor market slack increases significantly, reducing wage inflation pressures and signaling potential economic deceleration, which triggers risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.0%, or signal loses predictive power in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in GDPC1 and HOUST signals robust aggregate demand across both broad economic output and housing markets, reinforcing earnings growth expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no incremental predictive power over individual series, or 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of monetary tightening, a decline in FEDFUNDS breaks the tightening trajectory, signaling policy pivot expectations that rapidly lower borrowing costs and boost equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict positive returns during tightening regimes, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in regime-filtered samples.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in INDPRO reflects expanding industrial production capacity and operational efficiency, which supports corporate profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next trading week.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns are uncorrelated with INDPRO momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE indicates a tightening labor market with strong job creation and low slack, which fuels wage inflation fears and prompts equity sell-offs, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression, or 20-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of divergence periods.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS drops below its 12-month moving average, retail sales momentum weakens sharply, signaling consumer demand contraction that threatens corporate revenues and triggers negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns show positive correlation with RSAFS weakness, or threshold condition fails to filter out false signals in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Convergence of rising CPIAUCSL and falling FEDFUNDS creates a stagflationary policy mismatch where inflation accelerates while monetary policy eases, eroding real yields and triggering risk-off equity positioning, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power over 60-day horizon, or 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of convergence periods.
